title: Rajkot, Gujarat — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rajkot, Gujarat: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rajkot is a city in Gujarat with a population of 1,500,000. A major industrial center in Gujarat, known for its engineering and automotive industries, and as the hometown of Mahatma Gandhi.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
